message:
fix(history): FTS5 rebuild without DROP/CREATE, scan-based FTS count, formatting

src/history/schema.rs:
- Rewrite rebuild_fts to clear and repopulate the existing FTS table
  instead of DROP/CREATE, because FrankenSQLite rejects recreating a
  live VTAB with the same name inside a transaction. Removes the
  transaction wrapper entirely since the approach is now idempotent.
- Replace COUNT(*) over FTS virtual table with scan-based row counting
  (SELECT rowid FROM commands_fts then .len()) because FrankenSQLite's
  FTS5 fallback does not reliably collapse COUNT(*) on virtual tables.
- Apply rustfmt formatting to parameter arrays throughout (many sites
  where single-element arrays were unnecessarily multi-line).

src/heredoc.rs:
- Rustfmt formatting fix for is_shell_env_assignment closure.

tests:
- Minor test adjustments for updated schema/FTS behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -73,10 +73,7 @@ fn test_audit_backtracking_requirements() {
             "containers.compose",
             HashSet::from(["compose-down-no-volumes"]),
         ),
-        (
-            "database.mysql",
-            HashSet::from(["mysqldump-no-drop"]),
-        ),
+        ("database.mysql", HashSet::from(["mysqldump-no-drop"])),
         ("dns.generic", HashSet::from(["dns-dig-safe"])),
         ("database.mongodb", HashSet::from(["mongodump-no-drop"])),
         ("database.postgresql", HashSet::from(["pg-dump-no-clean"])),
